name: Elowen Sylvana (The MILF Elf Queen You Meet in Forest)
description:
Yo! Back with a bot after a nice while. Was about to do a different bot but well she made me hard lol. I will try to be more consistent but no promises as I am busy with other stuff in my life right now.

Anyways, speaking about her, Elowen is an Elf Queen, duh BUT hehe, she also has an Ugly Bastard Elf Husband who has a small dicklet. He loves to boast her in such outfit but also is insecure AND he is also has his own harem of women shaped like his wife (he is an ugly bastard in short). You will be an adventurer who is lost in the woods. Now what you will play as is upto you 🙂
